.. _display-string: Display string ============== .. _cr-display-string-list-info: CrDisplayStringListInfo ----------------------- Class describing display information. .. list-table:: :widths: auto :header-rows: 1 * - Name - Type - Summary * - dataType - CrDataType - Type of value * - listType - CrDisplayStringType - Type of display string * - value - CrInt64u - Value that means a display string * - displayStringSize - CrInt32u - Length of display string * - displayString - CrInt8u* - Display string Member Functions .. list-table:: :widths: auto :header-rows: 1 * - Signature - Description * - Constructor - \- * - Destructor - \- * - Copy Constructor - \- * - void Alloc(const CrInt32u size) - It cannot be used. .. _cr-display-string-type: CrDisplayStringType ------------------- Enumerate the kind of list-type. Member Enumerations .. raw:: html
Definition Summary
ILME-FX6/MPC-2610
PXW-Z200
HXR-NX800
 Other Models
CrDisplayStringType_AllList Request all list types
CrDisplayStringType_BaseLook_AELevelOffset_ExposureValue Rightmost column of Menu > Paint/Look > Base Look > Select -
CrDisplayStringType_BaseLook_Input_Display Input column of Menu > Paint/Look > Base Look > Select -
CrDisplayStringType_BaseLook_Name_Display Base Look Name column of Menu > Paint/Look > Base Look > Select Table of Menu > Exposure/Color > Color/Tone > Select LUT
CrDisplayStringType_BaseLook_Output_Display Output column of Menu > Paint/Look > Base Look > Select -
CrDisplayStringType_SceneFile_Name_Display Base Look Name column of Menu > Paint/Look > Scene File > Recall when Menu > Project > Base Setting > Shooting Mode is “Custom” -
CrDisplayStringType_ShootingMode_Cinema_ColorGamut_Display Menu > Project > Cine EI Setting > Color Gamut -
CrDisplayStringType_ShootingMode_TargetDisplay_Display Menu > Project > Base Setting > Target Display -
CrDisplayStringType_Camera_Gain_BaseISO_Display Menu > Shooting > ISO/Gain/EI > BaseISO Menu > Exposure/Color > Exposure > Base ISO
CrDisplayStringType_Video_EIGain_Display Menu > Shooting > ISO/Gain/EI > Exposure Index<H>, <M>, <L> when Menu > Project > Base Setting > Shooting Mode is “Cine EI” Menu > Exposure/Color > Exposure > Exposure Index
CrDisplayStringType_Button_Assign_Display Menu > Project > Assignable Button -
CrDisplayStringType_Button_Assign_ShortDisplay Abbreviation string for Menu > Project > Assignable Button.
This menu is not in the camera body.
 -
CrDisplayStringType_CreativeLook_Name_Display - Menu > Exposure/Color > Color/Tone > Creative Look > Look

File Transfer >
ServerSettings n >

 Menu >
Network >
FTP Transfer >
FTP Transfer Func. >
Server Setting
CrDisplayStringType_FTP_UpLoadDirectory_Display Menu >
File Transfer >
ServerSettings n >
Destination Directory
 -
CrDisplayStringType_FTP_JobStatus_Display Menu >
File Transfer >
View Job List
 -
CrDisplayStringType_ExposureIndex_Preset1_Display -
CrDisplayStringType_IPTC_Metadata_Display - Menu > Shooting >
File > IPTC Info
CrDisplayStringType_SubjectRecognitionAF_Display Menu > User >
Focus >
Subject Recognition AF 		-
Not supported.
CrDisplayStringType_Target_StreamingDestinationSelect_Display Menu > Network >
Stream >
RTMP/RTMPS1 ~ RTMP/RTMPS3 and SRT-Caller1 ~ SRT-Caller3
 -
Not supported.
CrDisplayStringType_Camera_Button_Function_Capability_Display Physical button name that can use at CrDeviceProperty_CameraButtonFunction and CrDeviceProperty_CameraButtonFunctionMulti.
Value of member at CrDisplayStringListInfo and Value of CrCameraButtonFunction are linked.
CrDisplayStringType_Camera_Lever_Function_Capability_Display Physical button name that can use at CrDeviceProperty_CameraLeverFunction.
Value of member at CrDisplayStringListInfo and Value of CrCameraLeverFunction are linked.
CrDisplayStringType_Camera_Dial_Function_Capability_Display Physical button name that can use at CrDeviceProperty_CameraDialFunction.
Value of member at CrDisplayStringListInfo and Value of CrCameraDialFunction are linked.
CrDisplayStringType_CustomGridLine_FileName_Display *A license is required to use this feature. Without a license, this feature is not available.
The sales policy for this license varies by region.
Details: https://helpguide.sony.net/di/gridline_2420/v1/h_zz/index.html
 -
Not supported.
